hero.title: avoin lukkari
hero.subtitle: An open & highly customizable timetable service for students at Turku University of Applied Sciences

about.title: what, why, how?
about.p1: Avoin Lukkari offers a faster and more visually modern alternative to view your schedule and studies. Built for learning purposes, it is open source and completely free forever.
about.p2: The entire project code is publicly available & open for contributions. Help improve the schedule for everyone!
about.p3: The site is available without logging in and your device remembers your settings :)

gallery.title: gallery
gallery.subtitle: A few showcase images! You can explore the app yourself to find more surprises.

items.fast: Faster than you need it to be!
items.details: Shows all necessary info - and why not some unnecessary too
items.config: Colorize a bit of everything (if you want)
